source_references.use: proportion, orthographic coverage, functional massing, and surface-detail hierarchy only

ship.longreach_expedition_cutter_mk1.role: six-crew long-range survey, salvage, and courier ship

station.meridian_exchange_mk1.role: modular trade, repair, habitation, and traffic-control outpost

exterior_contract.static_core: armored axial utility spine and central transfer hub

equipment.argent_eva_mk1.role: repair, boarding, and hazardous-environment pressure armor

requests.name: longreach_expedition_cutter_exterior_concept
requests.prompt: Original photorealistic multiview concept of a 52 m long, 18 m wide, 11 m high expedition spacecraft, clearly longer than wide. Six-crew pressurized cutter with armored axial keel, compact wedge nose, two tucked aft drive pods, dorsal docking collar, port airlock, ventral cargo ramp, radiators, RCS clusters, landing gear bays, layered titanium and carbon-composite panels. Grounded spacecraft engineering, not an aircraft. Consistent orthographic proportions, neutral studio light, no text, logo, stand, ground, weapons, detached parts, or background clutter.

reconstruction.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic expedition spacecraft: cool white painted aluminum, exposed brushed titanium keel and service edges, dark carbon-composite drive pods, charcoal ceramic heat shielding, restrained amber safety accents, subtle directional maintenance wear and thermal discoloration. No baked shadows or highlights, pseudo-text, logos, broad random grime, glowing seams, or battle damage.

requests.name: meridian_exchange_station_exterior_concept
requests.prompt: Original photorealistic multiview concept of a modular orbital trade and repair station, 180 m axial spine, 128 m across docking arms, 52 m high. Armored central transfer hub, four radial docking collars, two larger ship berths, cargo truss, tanks, service umbilicals, radiator roots, observation and traffic-control module. Believable pressure volumes and construction access, modular rather than monolithic, no gravity fantasy. Consistent orthographic geometry, neutral space-light studio, no ships, people, text, logos, weapons, planet, or background clutter.

reconstruction.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic orbital infrastructure: zinc-gray structural alloy, off-white replaceable pressure panels, dark thermal blankets and radiator roots, brushed steel docking rings, restrained amber wayfinding accents, localized service wear and thruster staining. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, universal rust, glowing seams, ships, or battle damage.

requests.name: argent_eva_suit_full_body_concept
requests.prompt: Photorealistic original full-body hard-surface EVA suit on one neutral adult human in a strict T-pose. Functional pressure garment under modular ceramic-composite helmet, collar, torso, shoulder, forearm, pelvis, thigh, shin and boot shells; compact life-support pack; sealed joints with believable flex gaps; clear laminated visor; tool mounts and rescue hardware. Industrial near-future engineering, not superhero armor, slim enough for ship corridors. Symmetric neutral lighting, no weapon, cape, text, logo, stand, or background clutter.

reconstruction.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic EVA suit: off-white matte ceramic-composite shells, charcoal woven pressure garment, brushed titanium joint hardware, clear neutral visor, dark life-support pack, restrained rescue-orange latches and pull points, localized hand and knee wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, glowing strips, broad grime, or battle damage.

requests.name: helix_service_carbine_concept
requests.prompt: Original photorealistic near-future vacuum-capable service carbine, 86 cm long, physically plausible compact receiver and barrel, folding adjustable stock, removable box magazine, low-profile optic, charging handle, selector, trigger guard, heat shielding, sling points and tool-less service latches. Functional layered metal and reinforced polymer, restrained science fiction, readable separate rigid parts. Consistent orthographic side, top, front and three-quarter views, neutral studio light, no person, hands, ammunition, text, logos, stand, or background clutter.

reconstruction.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic service carbine: dark phosphate steel barrel and controls, graphite anodized aluminum receiver, charcoal fiber-reinforced polymer grip and stock, heat-stained barrel shroud, low-glare optical glass, restrained amber witness accents, localized handling wear. No baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, glowing parts, camouflage, broad grime, or damage.

requests.name: helix_service_sidearm_concept
requests.prompt: Original photorealistic sealed-duty near-future sidearm, 31 cm long, plausible bore axis, compact upper receiver and barrel group, removable grip magazine, protected trigger, ambidextrous selector, low-profile sight module, service takedown seams and gloved-hand ergonomics. Functional metal and textured polymer, restrained science fiction, readable separate rigid parts. Consistent orthographic side, top, front and three-quarter views, neutral studio light, no person, hands, ammunition, text, logos, stand, or background clutter.

reconstruction.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic sealed-duty sidearm: nitrided steel barrel and controls, graphite anodized upper receiver, charcoal textured polymer grip, brushed takedown hardware, low-glare optical glass, restrained amber witness accents, localized handling wear. No baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, glowing parts, camouflage, broad grime, or damage.

requests.name: longreach_cockpit_pressure_frame
requests.prompt: One photorealistic hard-surface cockpit pressure-frame segment for a large expedition spacecraft, 6.4 m outer width, 3.2 m outer height, 0.55 m deep, with a 5.7 m by 2.55 m clear faceted opening. Layered load-bearing titanium ring, pressure seals, bolted splice plates, cable and ventilation channels, light recesses, inspection covers and realistic bevels. Symmetric, watertight solid architecture, isolated single object, front faces +Z. No wall fill, window, door, floor, console, seat, loose cables, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
requests.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic spacecraft pressure structure: brushed titanium load members, dark elastomer seals, graphite composite cable covers, subtle machining and maintenance wear, restrained amber service accents, no baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, dirt wash, or emissive glow.

requests.name: longreach_cockpit_pilot_seat
requests.prompt: One photorealistic spacecraft pilot seat for a suited adult, 0.74 m wide, 1.35 m high, 0.92 m deep. Rigid shock-isolated base, articulated back shell, headrest, segmented pressure cushions, five-point restraint anchors, folding arm supports, visible adjustment rails and rear service access. Human ergonomic proportions and believable construction, neutral upright pose, isolated single object, forward faces +Z. No person, cockpit, controls, screens, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
requests.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic cockpit seat: dark woven pressure fabric, charcoal composite shell, brushed titanium frame and rails, restrained amber release hardware, localized hand-contact wear, no baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad grime, or emissive glow.

Functional near-future avionics with layered depth and realistic bevels, isolated single object, pilot side faces -Z. requests.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic flight hardware: dark low-glare composite, anodized aluminum bezels, physical black display glass, brushed metal controls, restrained amber and cyan indicator lenses, subtle hand-contact wear, no baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, random grime, or active emissive content.
